scripts.setup: npm install && npm run setup:client && npm run setup:server
scripts.clean-node-modules: rm -rf node_modules && rm -rf server/node_modules && rm -rf client/node_modules
scripts.clean: npm run clean-dist && npm run clean-node-modules && npm run clean-coverage
scripts.deploy: npm run clean-dist && npm run build --prefix client && npm run start --prefix server
scripts.test: npm run test --prefix server && npm run test --prefix client
